## Corning announces quarterly dividend

Routine dividend announcement with no thematic implication; only relevant to a PM if GLW's dividend yield is a core position rationale or if the announcement deviates from prior pattern, which the headline does not suggest.

- GLW declared a routine quarterly dividend
